query:
-- Update the combined-name book_profiles row to use primary author
UPDATE book_profiles
SET authorName = 'Matthew Dixon'
WHERE bookTitle = 'The Effortless Experience'
  AND authorName = 'Matthew Dixon, Nick Toman & Rick DeLisi';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute 
-- Update the combined-name book_profiles row to use primary author
UPDATE book_profiles
SET authorName = 'Matthew Dixon'
WHERE bookTitle = 'The Effortless Experience'
  AND authorName = 'Matthew Dixon, Nick Toman & Rick DeLisi';
